compressed_prompt: Write two limericks for moms about how hard it is to get their kids to do chores. Be angry about it. Separate your two limericks with six asterisks (******).
response:
Sure, here are two limericks about the struggle of getting kids to do chores:

My kids never do any chores,
They just sit around and ignore,
I scream and I shout,
But they never help out,
It makes me want to walk out the door!

******

My children are driving me mad,
They never help out, it's so sad,
I've tried every trick,
But they just won't stick,
To doing their share, it's so bad!
